nasb.text: They took their flocks and their herds and their donkeys, and that which was in the city and that which was in the field;

esv.text: They took their flocks and their herds, their donkeys, and whatever was in the city and in the field.

cnv.text: 奪去他們的羊群、牛群和驢，以及城裡和田間所有的，

ccb.text: 他们抢走牛群、羊群、驴群和城里城外所有的东西，

csbs.text: 夺取了他们的羊群、牛群和驴子，以及城中和田间的一切；
